name: 850Credit (Credit Repair Services)
description_short: 850Credit is a credit repair service that disputes inaccurate and unverifiable negative items on credit reports. Operating for 15+ years, they claim to have helped hundreds of clients remove thousands of items.
description_long:
850Credit is a credit repair company based in Chicago (312 area code) that has been operating for over 15 years. The company positions itself as an experienced credit restoration service focused on helping consumers with damaged credit profiles recover their financial standing.

850Credit's core service involves analyzing credit reports from all three bureaus to identify inaccurate, misleading, and unverifiable information. They then challenge these items with credit bureaus, creditors, and collection agencies on the consumer's behalf. Their process includes providing a free online credit evaluation, conducting deep analysis of credit reports, and offering actionable guidance for credit rebuilding. Clients can track progress through an online portal. The company charges $1 for an initial credit score summary and offers a money-back guarantee on their services.

The company distinguishes itself through claims of deep expertise in consumer, business, and mortgage credit matters. They emphasize hands-on involvement throughout the credit repair process and position credit dispute work as legal consumer protection. Website testimonials highlight successful removal of negative items, with quoted clients reporting significantly improved credit reports.

However, the website contains a significant red flag: multiple paragraphs of unrelated content about Norwegian online casinos and Skrill payment methods are embedded in the service description section. This appears to be SEO spam or content injection that undermines the company's credibility and professionalism. The company makes broad claims but provides limited specificity about success rates, timelines, or actual dispute methodologies. As with all credit repair services, consumers should understand that disputes can only remove genuinely inaccurate information—legitimate negative items cannot be legally removed regardless of the service used.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free online credit evaluation and analysis of credit reports
Claims 15+ years of operating experience in credit repair
Provides $1 credit score summary as entry point
Claims experience across consumer, business, and mortgage credit
Provides online portal to track credit repair progress
Handles multiple negative item types (late payments, collections, bankruptcies, foreclosures, identity theft, etc.)
cons: Website contains irrelevant spam content about Norwegian online casinos, which raises red flags about site integrity and maintenance
No pricing transparency provided beyond the $1 initial fee; ongoing service costs not disclosed
No verifiable success rates, average timeline to results, or specific removal statistics published
Testimonials are limited and unverified; no third-party ratings or certification information visible
Website does not clearly explain the limitations of credit repair or that only inaccurate items can be removed
best_for: Consumers with multiple inaccurate or unverifiable negative items on their credit reports
Individuals seeking hands-on credit dispute assistance rather than DIY approaches
People with complex credit situations involving identity theft, charge-offs, or collection accounts
diagnosis: 850Credit is best for consumers with demonstrably inaccurate or unverifiable negative items who want professional dispute assistance rather than self-managing the process. Primary caveat: the website's embedded casino spam content is a serious credibility concern, and the company provides no verifiable success metrics, pricing transparency, or timeline expectations, making it difficult to assess actual value before committing.
services: Credit report analysis from all three bureaus
Identification of inaccurate and unverifiable information
Dispute filing with credit bureaus, creditors, and collection agencies
Dispute tracking and progress monitoring through online portal
Follow-up dispute efforts when items are verified with no change
Removal assistance for late payments, inquiries, short sales, charge-offs, bankruptcies, foreclosures, and other negative items
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: 850Credit disputes inaccurate items on credit reports with 15+ years of experience helping hundreds of clients remove negative items.
